start.speaker: Obstinate
start.text: Still walking? Look behind you: the city is near enough to return, and ahead there is nothing but mud, hunger, and sermons from strangers.

choices.text: I will not return to a familiar ruin.
What if the light is only distance and wishful thinking?

press_doubt.speaker: Obstinate
press_doubt.text: Exactly. Nothing. Come home while you can still laugh at this tomorrow.

choices.text: No. Even trembling, I would rather seek the light than make peace with the fire.

gives_up.speaker: Obstinate
gives_up.text: Then keep your burden and your little light. I am done following sorrow.
